content_of_post_to_answer: Why is my mind never stable, even when everything seems fine?
answer: Most people assume mental stability follows external calm, but the mind runs more like a prediction system than a mirror of current conditions. Even when life is fine, it keeps replaying unresolved possibilities, scanning for what isn't settled yet. External safety doesn't close internal 'open loops'. I go deeper into this pattern on my profile if you want to explore it further.
